'''chachofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaborbactam|vaborbactam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaborbactam|vaborbactam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chachofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæchefeth|chæchefeth]] || [[word:chæchefej|chæchefej]] || [[word:chæchefesh|chæchefesh]] || [[word:chæchefe|chæchefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chachochofoth|chachochofoth]] || [[word:chachochofoj|chachochofoj]] || [[word:chachochofosh|chachochofosh]] || [[word:chachochofo|chachochofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chachofoth|chachofoth]] || [[word:chachofoj|chachofoj]] || [[word:chachofosh|chachofosh]] || [[word:chachofo|chachofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chachoffoth|chachoffoth]] || [[word:chachoffoj|chachoffoj]] || [[word:chachoffosh|chachoffosh]] || [[word:chachoffof|chachoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chachofotho|chachofotho]] || [[word:chachofojo|chachofojo]] || [[word:chachofosho|chachofosho]] || [[word:chachofoko|chachofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chachofoth|chachofoth]] || [[word:chachofoj|chachofoj]] || [[word:chachofosh|chachofosh]] || [[word:chachofo|chachofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chachofothol|chachofothol]] || [[word:chachofojol|chachofojol]] || [[word:chachofoshol|chachofoshol]] || [[word:chachofokol|chachofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chachofothotho|chachofothotho]] || [[word:chachofojojo|chachofojojo]] || [[word:chachofoshosho|chachofoshosho]] || [[word:chachofoko|chachofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chachofothon|chachofothon]] || [[word:chachofojon|chachofojon]] || [[word:chachofoshon|chachofoshon]] || [[word:chachofokon|chachofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chachofothoro|chachofothoro]] || [[word:chachofojoro|chachofojoro]] || [[word:chachofoshoro|chachofoshoro]] || [[word:chachofokoro|chachofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
